title: matrix: browser (iife / dynamic import)
manager: Cover the browser entry paths — a classic IIFE script-tag build and native dynamic import — so FSL works both in a plain `<script>` and in a modern module-loading page. The browser is where the viewer and editor live; both delivery mechanisms have to be proven or the web story is guesswork.
cs: folds fsl#1282 (browser iife); dynamic-import leg is #1281
